seo.title: Family Routines - Daily Habit Checker & Routine Manager | TodayDone
seo.description: Easily manage your family's daily routines. Checklists, time tracking, count tracking and streak records — all in one free productivity tool. No sign-up required.
seo.keywords: routine management, habit tracker, daily checklist, kids habits, family routines, time management app, habit building, free productivity tool, offline app, PWA

seoLanding.heading: What is Family Routines?
seoLanding.intro: Tired of nagging your kids about daily habits? 'Family Routines' is a daily routine management tool designed for families. Check off daily tasks, track time and count-based routines, and stay motivated with streak records — all without any sign-up.
problems: Keeping track of kids' habits like brushing teeth, reading, and exercise every day is tedious
You want to manage each family member's routines in one place at a glance
You want to record how many consecutive days routines were completed for motivation
You need a lightweight tool that works directly in the mobile browser without app store downloads

howToSteps.title: 1. Register Family Members
howToSteps.desc: Add family members with names and emojis in the Settings page.

howToSteps.title: 2. Create Routines
howToSteps.desc: Choose from Check (yes/no), Time (target minutes), or Count (target reps) and register routines. E.g., Brush teeth (check), Reading (30 min), Jump rope (100 reps).

howToSteps.title: 3. Daily Check-ins
howToSteps.desc: Check off completed routines on the Today page. Time and count routines can be logged with simple buttons.

howToSteps.title: 4. View Records
howToSteps.desc: Check streak records and per-routine completion stats on the History page.

howToSteps.title: 5. Share Progress
howToSteps.desc: Share today's routine progress with family and friends via messaging apps.

faqs.q: Do I need to sign up?
faqs.a: No. You can use it right away without any sign-up or login. All data is stored securely on your device (browser).

faqs.q: Can multiple family members use it together?
faqs.a: Yes! Register multiple family members in Settings to manage each person's routines separately. See everyone's routines in one place.
Yes, install it as a PWA (Progressive Web App) to use it without internet. Add it to your home screen to use like a regular app.

faqs.q: What if I lose my data?
faqs.a: You can export backup files from Settings > Data Management. Regular backups ensure safe data restoration when switching devices or clearing browser cache.
Yes, you can receive daily routine reminders at your preferred time. Set the notification time in Settings to get browser notifications every day.

notes: Data is stored in the browser (IndexedDB). Clearing cache may delete data — back up regularly.
Automatic sync across devices is not supported. Manual backup/restore is available.
Works best on modern browsers (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge).
